summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Code Review Co-Pilot application. Core functionality working excellently with Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration. Frontend UI fully functional with all required features. Minor backend issue with GitHub repository analysis.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Returns 400 'No code files found in repository' for valid GitHub repos
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Backend only checks root directory for code files with specific extensions

integration_issues.issue: Shows error toast when GitHub API returns 400 due to backend issue

passed_tests: Page loads correctly with proper title and design
Tab switching between PASTE CODE and GITHUB REPO modes
Code analysis with Claude Sonnet 4.5 (quality score: 35/100)
Results display: quality score, issues, security risks, code smells, improvements
Improved code display with syntax highlighting
Error handling for invalid GitHub URLs
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix GitHub repository analysis: Backend needs to recursively search subdirectories for code files, not just root directory. Current implementation only checks root level files with extensions ['.py', '.js', '.ts', '.jsx', '.tsx', '.java', '.cpp', '.c', '.go', '.rs']
